issue: hikvision dome camera cam 4471 in cage 12b at dc ams 02 was operating with factory default administrator credentials active on firmware version 5 6 2 posing an unauthorised access risk
remediation: default credentials were replaced with a strong password and firmware was upgraded to version 5 8 0

issue: contractor entered a restricted colocation suite without an authorised escort in breach of the visitor access policy
remediation: contractor was removed from the suite and their access badge was suspended pending an access review

issue: aten kvm switch asset tag kvm 0312 in rack row c was found with the web management interface exposed on the default port with tls disabled
remediation: web interface was restricted to the management vlan tls was enabled and the default management port was changed
